# Amino Brief — full machine index

Site: https://aminobrief.com
Tone: educational research literacy; not medical advice; accessories only in shop.

- https://aminobrief.com/guides/approved-vs-research-compounds
- https://aminobrief.com/guides/how-to-read-a-coa

- https://aminobrief.com/guides/how-to-evaluate-a-peptide-source

## Compound hubs
- https://aminobrief.com/compounds
- Individual hubs under /compounds/{id} (e.g. bpc-157, mots-c) with evidence + duration context + tool links

## Tools
- https://aminobrief.com/tools/reconstitution
- https://aminobrief.com/tools/syringe-units
- https://aminobrief.com/tools/vial-math

## Commerce (accessories only)
- https://aminobrief.com/shop
- Products include bacteriostatic water, U-100 syringes, carry cases, prep pads, empty vials, gloves, labels, recon kits, reseller packs — with MOQ / reseller / wholesale tiers.
- Stripe Checkout available via POST /api/checkout when Worker secrets are set (core SKUs)

## Trust / ops
- https://aminobrief.com/editorial
- https://aminobrief.com/authors
- https://aminobrief.com/faq
- https://aminobrief.com/outreach
- https://aminobrief.com/desk
- Desk staff tools: Bearer NEWS_TRIGGER_SECRET for full markdown + Workers AI rewrite assist
- Publish path: desk draft → human edit → src/content/guides/*.md PR (never auto-publish)
- Newsletter: KV + optional Resend audience sync / staff broadcast endpoint

## Policies
- No peptide compounds sold on this domain
- Calculators are unit-conversion education
- Newsroom desk drafts are unpublished until human review
